title: Quality & Scrap Analytics
text:
This project presents a cross-system quality and scrap analysis for a custom sheet metal fabricator operating across five production lines and two shifts. The analysis spans 36 months of production data across five source systems: ERP, MES, QMS, Materials/WMS, and HR.
Quality and scrap data had never been analyzed in combination across these systems. A data pipeline was built to extract, standardize, and join records into a single analytical layer — surfacing four cross-system patterns that were invisible within any individual source system.

Quality and scrap data had never been analyzed in combination across these systems. A data pipeline was built to extract, standardize, and join records into a single analytical layer — surfacing four cross-system patterns that were invisible within any individual source system.

title: Quality & Scrap Analytics
text:
What’s Included
Operations Dashboard A live operating dashboard showing weekly, monthly, and trailing 12-month views of key quality and scrap metrics across the production operation.
Diagnostic Report A full diagnostic analysis documenting the four cross-system patterns identified, their statistical significance, and their financial impact across the 36-month analysis period.
